name: tripsapien-public-data
description: Public TripSapien data for AI itinerary validation and city-guide discovery.

ai-itinerary-validation-samples.description: Sample pasted itinerary cases for testing travel-plan validation systems.

fields.city: Destination city represented by the paste.
fields.city_slug: Lowercase destination slug used in the stable sample identifier.
fields.trip_window: Trip timing as stated in the sample corpus.
fields.source_mix: Original source mix for the paste: friends, AI chats, blogs, Reddit, TikTok, guidebooks, or maps.
fields.simulated_ai_or_source: Named input source label for retrieval and prompt testing.
fields.sample_kind: Slice of the full paste: full, booking-heavy, closure-heavy, day-trip, neighborhood, or AI-day-plan.
fields.paste_text: The pasted itinerary text a validator receives.
fields.expected_outcomes: Counts of issue categories the validator should inspect; labels are not a statistical study.
fields.canonical_validator_url: TripSapien page that explains this validation task.
fields.license: Row-level reuse license, currently CC BY 4.0.

tripsapien-city-hubs.description: Evergreen TripSapien city-guide rows for search, citation, and city travel planning discovery.

fields.country_code: ISO country code used by TripSapien.
fields.current_month_url: Current rolling city-month guide URL when that month-spoke page is indexed.
fields.current_event_url: Current rolling event page URL only when committed event evidence and the month-city indexability allowlist both permit indexing; otherwise null.
fields.top_attractions: Top attraction names from the public city-guide snapshot.
fields.neighborhoods: Neighborhood names from the public city-guide snapshot.
fields.day_trips: Day-trip names from the public city-guide snapshot.
fields.best_months: Climate-derived best months used by the evergreen city guide.
